name: Whisper STT Worker
description: Speech-to-text transcription with faster-whisper. Supports word-level timestamps, SRT/VTT output, speaker diarization (WhisperX + pyannote), auto language detection, translation, and batch processing.

presets.name: Whisper large-v3-turbo (INT8)
presets.description: Fast transcription with large-v3-turbo model. INT8 quantization for efficient T4 deployment. Best speed/accuracy tradeoff for most use cases.

presets.name: Whisper large-v3 (FP16)
presets.description: Highest accuracy transcription with large-v3 model. FP16 for best quality. Recommended for professional transcription requiring maximum accuracy.

presets.name: Whisper large-v3-turbo + Diarization (INT8)
presets.description: Turbo transcription with speaker diarization via WhisperX + pyannote. Requires HF_TOKEN with pyannote model access. Identifies who said what.
